properties.name: checked
properties.description: The checked state is used when the parent listbox is in multiple selection mode. To avoid accessibility conflicts, the checked state should not be present in single selection mode.

properties.name: defaultSelected
properties.description: Sets the option's initial selected state (mirrors the native `selected` attribute)

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Sets the option to be disabled

properties.name: icon
properties.description: A decorative icon for the element. See the [Vivid Icon Gallery](/icons/icons-gallery/) for available icons and `icon-name`s

properties.name: label
properties.description: Text to be displayed instead of `text` when the option is selected

properties.name: selected
properties.description: Indicates whether the option is currently selected

properties.name: text-secondary
properties.description: Secondary text displayed below or next to the primary text

properties.name: value
properties.description: Value to be submited as part of the form data

properties.name: matchedText
properties.description: Text to highlighted as matching a search query

properties.name: tagConnotation
properties.description: When displayed as a tag, the connotation of the tag

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Add an icon before the option's text

slots.name: trailing-meta
slots.description: For additional elements at the end of the Menu Item

slots.name: tag-icon
slots.description: Icon to be displayed in the tag when selected inside of Searchable Select
